creator: bruno@clisp.org
text:
The cause is that the file src/lib/libc/locale/mbrtocXX_iconv.h puts some data into the mbstate_t. Whereas the mbsinit() function, as defined in src/lib/libc/locale/mbsinit.c, tests only a single word from this state.

mbsinit() should return 0 if ((_ConversionState *)ps)->srcbuf_len > 0 || ((_ConversionState *)ps)->dstbuf_len > 0.
